title: TimeChanger
description: A lightweight client-side mod that allows you to change the world time.
body:
## What is TimeChanger?
**TimeChanger** is a lightweight client-side mod that allows you to change the world time.

### Features
* **Time Control**: Seamlessly lock your client-side to any time of day.
* **Time Scrolling**: Quickly adjust the time by holding a hotkey and using your mouse wheel.
* **Menu**: Includes a graphical interface to easily manage your settings and toggle features. (Requires [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl))

### Keybinds
* **Scroll Time (Default: M)**: Hold this key while scrolling the mouse wheel to increase or decrease the time.
* **Toggle Time (Default: N)**: Quickly enable or disable the time override.

### Commands and Usage
`/timechanger <menu | set | toggle>`
